/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/test-chat.dir/test-chat.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test-chat.dir/get-model.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-chat  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: ../tools/server/libserver-context.a ../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9793 ../common/libllama-common-base.a ../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.9793 ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9793 ../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2
